proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_olaparib increases objective_response specifically in brca2_mutation=1 patients (positive interaction; little/no effect in BRCA2 wild-type).
treatment_pembrolizumab increases objective_response specifically in msi_high=1 patients (positive interaction).
treatment_lu177_psma increases objective_response specifically in psma_high=1 patients (positive interaction).
treatment_enzalutamide effect on objective_response is reduced in ar_v7_positive=1 patients (negative interaction; AR-V7 mediated resistance).
treatment_abiraterone effect on objective_response is reduced in ar_v7_positive=1 patients (negative interaction).
treatment_docetaxel response does NOT depend on ar_v7_positive (no interaction expected; chemo bypasses AR-V7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_enzalutamide × mcrpc interaction: enzalutamide effect on objective_response is much larger in mcrpc=0 (non-castrate-resistant) than in mcrpc=1.
Three-way interaction: enzalutamide effect requires mcrpc=0 AND ar_v7_positive=0 (effect is concentrated in this cell).
Within mcrpc=0 AND ar_v7_positive=0, treatment_enzalutamide produces a large positive ORR difference vs no enzalutamide.
Among mcrpc=1 patients, treatment_enzalutamide does NOT improve objective_response (effect ≈ 0).

For treatment_pembrolizumab, the largest positive ORR difference (treated minus control) appears in a 3-feature subgroup containing msi_high=1.
For treatment_lu177_psma, the largest positive ORR difference (treated minus control) appears in a 3-feature subgroup containing psma_high=1.

proposed_hypotheses.text: FINAL: treatment_enzalutamide produces a large increase in objective_response specifically in patients with mcrpc=0 AND ar_v7_positive=0; outside this subgroup the effect is ≈0.
FINAL candidate: treatment_abiraterone has the largest (positive but still modest) ORR effect in brca2_mutation=1 patients; outside this subgroup the effect is ≈0.
FINAL: treatment_abiraterone has no detectable main effect on objective_response in the cohort overall.
FINAL: treatment_docetaxel has no detectable main effect on objective_response and no biomarker subgroup with significant benefit was identified.
FINAL: treatment_olaparib has no detectable main effect on objective_response. In brca2_mutation=1 patients, olaparib trends toward LOWER ORR (opposite of expected).
FINAL: Within brca2_mutation=1, treatment_olaparib does not increase objective_response; if anything ORR is lower (negative direction).
FINAL: treatment_lu177_psma has no detectable main effect on objective_response. In psma_high=1 patients (the canonical eligibility group) no benefit is observed.
FINAL: Within psma_high=1, treatment_lu177_psma does not improve objective_response.
FINAL: treatment_pembrolizumab has no detectable main effect on objective_response. In msi_high=1 patients no benefit is observed.
FINAL: Within msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab does not improve objective_response.
